success_criteria: CI proves install import CLI and tests
Docs are honest about v0 maturity
Repo uses its own workspace model for real work
goals.title: Make Palari Company OS a professional Python CLI foundation

success_criteria: Work can move from scope to evidence to review to human decision
Future broker or policy work stays clearly out of scope until designed
goals.title: Grow the product model without bringing back old ticket ceremony

humans.name: Rafa Founder
humans.capacity_signal: Sets direction and accepts repo milestones

humans.capacity_signal: Can implement and review repo-local changes; cannot self-accept founder authority

palaris.name: Steward
palaris.scope: Keeps Palari Company OS maintainable, verifiable, and honest about maturity.

forbidden_actions: change authority policy without human decision
standards: prefer adaptive intensity over fixed ceremony
palaris.name: Architect
palaris.scope: Turns operating lessons into product model changes without adding ceremony for its own sake.

playbook_sources.label: Superpowers skills
playbook_sources.install_hint: Review the linked skill before use; Palari recommendations are guidance, not authority.

integrations.label: Palari Company OS GitHub repo
integrations.notes: Dry-run repo notification and issue/comment payload previews only.

workbenches.label: Repo Foundation
workbenches.summary: Maintainer work for the Python CLI, schemas, tests, docs, and local agent operating contract.

workbenches.label: Product Architecture
workbenches.summary: Design work for adaptive intensity, authority boundaries, broker safety, and future policy controls.

work_items.title: Complete strict validation history and repo hygiene foundation
work_items.scope: Represent the recent strict validation fixtures, append-only workspace history, professional metadata, CI, install smoke, and maturity documentation as one completed repo foundation milestone.
work_items.acceptance_target: Main contains the validation/history/hygiene commits, verification passes, GitHub CI passes, and the result is captured as dogfood history.

work_items.title: Add workspace init and seed ergonomics
work_items.scope: Create a small command or documented path for initializing a blank workspace without hand-writing the shell JSON.
work_items.acceptance_target: A new maintainer can create a valid empty workspace with one command and then add records through the CLI.

work_items.title: Split larger workspaces into maintainable source files
work_items.scope: Design and implement a simple multi-file workspace layout while preserving workspace.json compatibility and validation clarity.
work_items.acceptance_target: The dogfood workspace can grow without one giant JSON file and existing single-file workspaces still load.

verification_expectations: queue recommendation tests if model fields change
work_items.title: Design adaptive intensity for task sizing
work_items.scope: Turn the product idea of model-relative task sizing into concrete workspace fields and queue guidance without forcing subticket ceremony.
work_items.acceptance_target: Docs and model guidance explain when a stronger model can safely handle larger scoped work and when decomposition is required.

work_items.title: Define future broker and policy boundary roadmap
work_items.scope: Decide the minimum safety design before any real broker execution or policy acceptance can exist.
work_items.acceptance_target: Founder-approved design constraints exist before implementation starts.

work_items.title: Polish agent loop readiness surfaces
work_items.scope: Make the agent loop easier to follow by surfacing next-step types and missing-proof commands across CLI, dashboard, and docs.
work_items.acceptance_target: Agents can see the next safe step, missing proof commands, and handoff state without parsing raw attention text.

work_items.title: Add agent handoff packet contract
work_items.scope: Add a read-only agent handoff packet and route human review or decision states through it.
work_items.acceptance_target: Agents can hand off review or decision states with compact context while human action commands remain separate from agent-safe reads.

work_items.title: Clarify agent review and mode commands
work_items.scope: Make agent command surfaces clearer by exposing review-mode packet/check commands in detail/dashboard and making execute/review modes explicit in emitted commands and text output.
work_items.acceptance_target: Agents can tell whether they are in execute or review mode and can see the right packet/check command without guessing.

work_items.title: Harden dry-run integration validation
work_items.scope: Fail closed when hand-edited dry-run integration records declare unsupported provider actions, raw secret-looking plan payloads, or outbox payloads that differ from the approved plan.
work_items.acceptance_target: Workspace validation catches unsupported provider/action declarations, raw integration plan payload secrets, and outbox payload/source-boundary drift before any future execution boundary.

work_items.title: Clarify heuristic intensity warnings
work_items.scope: Make queue intensity wording distinguish declared work intensity from heuristic concerns so completed low-risk dogfood work does not look contradictory.
work_items.acceptance_target: Queue text labels heuristic mismatches as intensity concern or note and explains the declared intensity without changing safety behavior.

work_items.title: Enforce integration mode action boundaries
work_items.scope: Make integration mode authoritative so hand-edited dry-run integration records cannot declare actions outside their mode boundary.
work_items.acceptance_target: Workspace validation rejects mode/action mismatches while preserving dry-run provider previews and no live external calls.

work_items.title: Validate Palari memory source references
work_items.scope: Fail closed when a Palari memory source references a missing source record.
work_items.acceptance_target: Workspace validation rejects missing Palari memory source references while preserving existing examples and dogfood workspaces.

work_items.title: Add workspace data map command
work_items.scope: Add a read-only command that explains where workspace data, sources, integrations, memory references, and history live.
work_items.acceptance_target: Users and agents can run palari data map in text or JSON to understand data boundaries without live connectors or memory engines.

work_items.title: Allow safe receipt-ready work completion
work_items.scope: Let local low-risk receipt-ready work complete without forcing heavier evidence/review ceremony, while preserving dependency and external-write blockers.
work_items.acceptance_target: R1/R2 receipt-ready work with approval count 0, terminal dependencies, no open decisions, and no external writes can complete; other work still fails closed.

work_items.title: Add source readiness metadata
work_items.scope: Add optional source readiness metadata for data class, authority, steward, freshness, and redaction needs.
work_items.acceptance_target: Source readiness fields validate strictly, surface in data map, and preserve existing workspace behavior.

work_items.title: Expose source readiness in agent packets
work_items.scope: Carry source readiness metadata into agent brief packets so agents see data class, authority, steward, freshness, and redaction boundaries.
work_items.acceptance_target: Allowed source packets include readiness metadata, packet docs mention the boundary, and existing packet behavior stays stable.

work_items.title: Focus queue output on current work
work_items.scope: Make the queue command focus on current non-closed work by default while preserving an include-closed audit path.
work_items.acceptance_target: Default queue output omits closed items; --include-closed restores the full queue; docs and tests cover both paths.

forbidden_actions: give the Bash heuristic deny authority
let hook errors block unrelated sessions
work_items.title: Enforce packet write boundaries inside Claude Code
work_items.scope: Turn the cooperative agent check contract into structural enforcement for Claude Code sessions using PreToolUse, Stop, and SessionStart hooks driven by persisted claims and packets.
work_items.acceptance_target: Out-of-boundary Write/Edit/NotebookEdit calls are denied before the write; suspected Bash writes escalate to a human ask; stops are blocked while the tree escapes the boundary; install is idempotent and preserves foreign hooks.

attempts.result: Strict validation fixtures, append-only history, repository hygiene, install smoke, and CI were implemented and pushed to origin/main.
Added a workspace init command, tests, and documentation.
Added read-only split workspace collection_files support while preserving single-file workspaces.
Agent next, check, finish, and human-facing queue/state/detail/dashboard surfaces now share next-step classifications and prioritize missing proof commands.
Added read-only agent handoff packets and made agent next finish detail and dashboard surfaces point to the handoff bridge.
Clarified agent review and mode command surfaces for detail dashboard next check text output and review handoff text.

Hardened dry-run integration validation by sharing provider/action support, scanning plan payload previews for raw secrets, and requiring outbox previews and source boundaries to match approved plans.
Clarified queue intensity mismatch wording by separating declared intensity from heuristic concern and adding regression coverage.
Made integration mode enforce action boundaries, updated example modes, and added regression coverage.
Validated Palari memory source references, normalized example memory sources to source IDs, and added regression coverage.
Added read-only data map command covering storage, sources, integrations, memory-source references, history, and non-stored boundaries.
Allowed safe receipt-ready completion for local low-risk work while preserving dependency, decision, approval, and external-write blockers.
Added source readiness metadata, strict validation, data-map output, examples, and regression coverage.
Exposed source readiness metadata in agent brief packets and documented the boundary.
Changed queue CLI output to omit closed work by default and added --include-closed for audit views.
Added palari claude install/status/hook so Claude Code hooks deny out-of-boundary writes, block dirty stops, and inject the packet contract at session start.

evidence_runs.summary: Local verification and GitHub CI passed for the repo foundation milestone.
Workspace init command, tests, docs, full verifier, unit tests, and install smoke passed.
Split workspace collection file support is present; split fixture validation and current full verification passed.
Agent loop readiness surfaces were verified locally; missing-proof commands now appear before generic inspect commands.
Agent handoff command and routing were verified locally with focused tests full verification install smoke and CLI smokes.

commands: ./bin/palari --workspace examples/acme-company-os agent check WORK-0003 --as PALARI-SOFIA --mode execute
evidence_runs.summary: Agent review mode command ergonomics and handoff text focus passed focused tests full verification unit discovery install smoke and CLI smokes.
Dry-run integration validation hardening passed focused integration/validation tests, full verification, full unit discovery, and install smoke.
Heuristic intensity warning wording passed focused read-model tests, full verification, unit discovery, install smoke, and queue CLI smoke.
Integration mode/action validation passed focused integration/validation tests, full verification, unit discovery, and install smoke.
Memory source validation passed focused validation tests, full verification, unit discovery, install smoke, and workspace validation smokes.
Data map command passed focused data-map tests, full verification, unit discovery, install smoke, and text/JSON command smokes.
Receipt-ready completion path passed focused validation/read-model/history tests, full verification, unit discovery, and install smoke.
Source readiness metadata passed focused validation/data-map/authoring tests, full verification, unit discovery, and install smoke.

commands: ./bin/palari --workspace examples/acme-company-os agent brief WORK-0007 --as PALARI-SOFIA --mode execute --json
evidence_runs.summary: Agent packet readiness fields passed focused packet tests, packet smoke, full verification, unit discovery, and install smoke.
Queue focus change passed focused queue CLI tests, queue smoke checks, full verification, unit discovery, and install smoke.
Claude Code enforcement passed focused hook tests, full unit discovery, repository verification, lint, and type checks.

residual_risks: The workspace is still a single JSON file
Dogfood records are manually curated by CLI commands
No concurrent merge model exists yet

tradeoffs: Fast demos are tempting but risky
Mock-only work preserves learning without side effects
Real authority requires custody and audit
decisions.question: What is the minimum safety design before Palari Company OS can execute broker actions or real policy authority?
decisions.context: The v0.1 foundation intentionally keeps broker execution and policy acceptance disabled.
decisions.recommendation: Keep broker and policy work documentation-only until signed gates, custody, audit, and human quorum are designed.
decisions.safe_default: Do not implement external side effects.

useful: The CLI could author most records directly
The queue model cleanly identifies evidence review decision and integration states
Install smoke exposed a real Python 3.10 compatibility bug before closeout
failed: Long list fields through CLI flags are awkward
Review findings cannot yet be structured through first-class CLI flags
follow_up_needed: Consider import/export or seed helpers for larger workspaces
Keep dogfood workspace updated as repo maturity work continues
model_worker_notes: Dogfooding was feasible with ordinary CLI commands after seeding the empty workspace shell
outcomes.summary: The repo reached a cleaner v0.1 foundation with verification, install smoke, CI, and honest maturity docs.
outcomes.what_happened: The recent validation, history, and hygiene work was merged to main and then represented inside the dogfood workspace.
outcomes.what_changed: Palari Company OS now has a real internal workspace that can track its own next repo maturity work.
